watchlist.name: Vanguard Total International Stock ETF
watchlist.notes: Portfolio is 100% US — adding international exposure reduces home-country bias and captures emerging market growth

watchlist.name: Vanguard Total Bond Market ETF
watchlist.notes: No fixed income in portfolio — bonds reduce volatility and provide stability during equity downturns

watchlist.name: Vanguard Health Care ETF
watchlist.notes: Healthcare is a major GICS sector with defensive characteristics — currently absent from portfolio

watchlist.name: NVIDIA Corporation
watchlist.notes: Leading AI chip maker — high growth potential, though already indirectly held via VTI/VOO/VGT

watchlist.name: Avantis US Small Cap Value ETF
watchlist.notes: Small-cap value factor historically outperforms large caps long-term — adds factor diversification

watchlist.name: Vanguard Real Estate ETF
watchlist.notes: REITs provide income + inflation hedge, low correlation with tech — adds asset class diversification
